latest.title: Israel Commits to New Lebanon Cease-Fire, Ambassador Says, but Troops Will Remain
latest.summary: The fighting between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon had delayed the next stage of talks to end the U.S.-Iranian war. Hezbollah did not immediately…

latest.title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea…
latest.summary: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.

latest.title: Minimum age of 11 set for UK puberty blocker trial
latest.summary: Gender-questioning children will have to be at least 11 years old to take part in a clinical trial of puberty-blocking drugs.

radar.title: Watch: World Cup fans react to US defeating Australia to reach knockout round
radar.summary: US supporters were delighted after their team won 2-0 against the Socceroos while Australian fans were left disappointed but still hopeful.

radar.title: Australia confirms first case of H5N1 bird flu as virus reaches every continent
radar.summary: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.

radar.title: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
radar.summary: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.

radar.title: New video game console aims to get kids moving
radar.summary: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
